reviews.review_title: This could be a lot of fun if fixed.
reviews.review_description:
I doubt they will fix it as it is almost abandonware, but it has a glitch where the menu won’t disappear. Seems like an easy thing to fix. 

With the menu in place, it detracts from the experience significantly. It worked correctly, when I first purchased it and was a fun and well executed piece of nostalgia. 

Regrettably, it is no longer playable. 

I’ll revise my review if they fix it.
Menu wont go away. Easy fix I’m sure but they’ve yet to do it.

reviews.review_title: Fun but the menu won't go away
reviews.review_description: It's a good game and a classic one that I remembered that I played while growing up. The only issue is that the menu after pressing the A button won't go away so I can't see it all.

reviews.review_title: Fun but can't get rid of menu screen
reviews.review_description: The game starts playing, but it just has a menu screen that says "press A to start" over it the whole time. Pressing A doesn't help.
Pretty cool for a free game and also if you’re old enough to remember duck hunt from the original NES.
It is a good game for it to be free but it is pretty hard to aim unless you get close then it’s easy!
